project.name: AI Grid Management Platform
project.description: As part of the December 2025 Google Cloud partnership, Enterprise gained access to Google's advanced AI models including TimesFM 2.5 for time-series forecasting, WeatherNext 2 for weather prediction, and security-constrained power flow modeling. The first commercial AI grid management product is expected to launch via Google Cloud Marketplace by mid-2026. The platform enables AI-powered field operations including predictive maintenance 30+ days in advance, supply chain optimization, and weather response automation. For Regional Utility hurricane operations, integration with WeatherNext 2 enables improved storm preparation, resource positioning, and restoration optimization. This product represents a potential new revenue stream by licensing Enterprise's operational expertise combined with Google AI to other utilities facing similar grid management challenges.

features.name: Predictive Maintenance AI Module
features.description: ML-powered prediction of equipment failures 30+ days in advance using sensor data and Google's TimesFM models
acceptanceCriteria: Model training on Enterprise data complete

features.name: Weather Response Optimization
features.description: Integration with Google's WeatherNext 2 for storm preparation, resource positioning, and restoration optimization

features.name: Google Cloud Marketplace Product
features.description: Commercialize AI grid management platform for sale to other utilities via Google Cloud Marketplace by mid-2026

stories.name: Transformer Failure Prediction Model
stories.description: Train and deploy ML model to predict transformer failures using dissolved gas analysis and temperature data
acceptanceCriteria: Model trained on 5 years historical data

stories.name: Hurricane Path Impact Prediction
stories.description: Integrate WeatherNext hurricane forecasts with Regional Utility infrastructure data to predict outage impacts

tasks.name: Prepare training dataset from SCADA historians
Fine-tune TimesFM model on transformer data

milestones.name: Internal AI Platform MVP
deliverables: Predictive maintenance live at Regional Utility

milestones.name: Marketplace Product Launch
deliverables: Commercial product on Google Cloud Marketplace

dependencies.name: Google Cloud AI Models
dependencies.description: Access to TimesFM 2.5 and WeatherNext 2 models granted under partnership

dependencies.name: Internal Data Platform
dependencies.description: Requires Enterprise Enterprise Data Platform for ML training data access

risks.name: AI Model Accuracy
risks.mitigation: Extensive validation on historical data; phased rollout with human oversight

risks.name: Marketplace Adoption
risks.mitigation: Primary value is internal operational savings; commercial product is upside
